# CaedoAi — Full Site Content for LLM Ingestion

## About

CaedoAi is a web development studio specializing in custom websites and digital marketing solutions for home service businesses. We build high-converting websites for HVAC contractors, plumbers, electricians, roofers, and other service companies in the United States.

We design and develop websites that generate qualified leads and convert visitors into customers. Our approach combines modern web design, local SEO optimization, mobile responsiveness, and ongoing support. We work exclusively with home service verticals, understanding their unique business needs and competitive landscape.

## Services

### Custom Website Development
Full-stack website development tailored to home service businesses. Includes lead capture forms, service area maps, testimonials, photo galleries, and mobile optimization. Built for conversion and user experience.

### Local SEO & AEO Optimization
Search engine optimization focused on local rankings. We optimize Google Business Profile, local citations, keyword targeting, and technical SEO. Also includes AI-powered search (AEO) optimization for emerging AI search platforms.

### Lead Generation & Management
Integrated contact forms, appointment scheduling systems, CRM setup, and lead tracking. We ensure every lead is captured and you can measure ROI.

### Content Strategy & Blogging
Regular blog posts, service pages, and content updates to improve SEO rankings and establish authority in your market. Topics tailored to your service area and target audience.

### Mobile Optimization
Fully responsive design ensuring your website looks perfect on all devices. Mobile-first approach since most service searches happen on phones.

### Analytics & Performance Reporting
Monthly reports showing website traffic, lead sources, conversion rates, and ROI. Full transparency on what's working.

## Who We Serve

- **HVAC Contractors** — heating, cooling, maintenance, emergency services
- **Plumbing Companies** — residential, commercial, emergency plumbing
- **Electrical Contractors** — residential, commercial, industrial electrical work
- **Roofing Companies** — residential and commercial roofing services
- **Multi-service Companies** — general contracting, handyman, maintenance services

## How We Work

- **Discovery Phase** — understand your business, target market, and goals
- **Strategy & Planning** — competitive analysis, keyword research, site architecture
- **Design & Development** — custom design, development, lead capture setup
- **Launch & Optimization** — testing, refinement, performance optimization
- **Ongoing Support** — monthly maintenance, updates, performance monitoring, SEO improvements

## Pricing Model

Custom pricing based on:
- Current web presence and starting point
- Scope of services (website only vs. SEO vs. full marketing support)
- Geographic service area
- Competition level in your market
- Lead generation goals

No hidden fees. Transparent monthly retainers with clear deliverables and ROI tracking.

## Why Choose CaedoAi

- **Home Service Expertise** — we understand HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and roofing businesses
- **Lead-Focused** — every design decision is made to generate and convert leads
- **Local SEO Specialists** — dominate local search rankings in your service areas
- **Dedicated Support** — direct access to your development team, not outsourced support
- **Proven Results** — case studies and live examples from successful clients
- **Long-term Partnership** — we scale with your growth and expand services as you grow

## FAQ

**How long does a website take to build?**
Typical timeline is 2-4 weeks from start to launch, depending on scope. Rush projects available.

**Will my website help me get more leads?**
Our websites are built specifically for lead generation. We focus on user experience, conversion optimization, and lead capture. Success depends on traffic + conversion, and we help with both.

**Do you do SEO?**
Yes. Local SEO is included in our website packages. We optimize for local rankings, Google Business Profile, and local citations.

**Can you help with Google Ads or paid advertising?**
We focus on organic/SEO. However, we can set up conversion tracking and analytics to measure performance of any paid campaigns you run.

**What if I already have a website?**
We can audit your current site, identify issues, and either improve it or build a new one. Many of our clients come to us with outdated or ineffective websites.

**How do you measure success?**
Through analytics and lead tracking. We set up systems to measure website traffic, lead sources, conversion rates, and ROI. Monthly reports show exactly what's working.

**Do you offer hosting and maintenance?**
Yes. Hosting, security, backups, and ongoing maintenance are included or available as add-ons.

**What if I need to update content or add new pages?**
Included in our ongoing support. You can request updates and we handle them. No surprises, no per-hour charges.

**How do I get started?**
Book a free 30-minute discovery call at https://calendly.com/caedoai/30min or fill out our contact form at https://www.caedoai.com/contact. We'll discuss your business, goals, and how we can help.
